persona.description: A careful shopper who repeatedly weighs price and value before engaging.

behavior_description: 0-2s: The primary shopper stands near the product with one companion nearby. 2-5s: The shopper gestures toward the product and turns to the companion for input. 5-8s: The companion looks at the product while the shopper watches their reaction. 8-10s: The shopper and companion continue quietly comparing the option without purchasing.

behavior_timeline.event: The primary shopper stands near the product with one companion nearby.
The shopper gestures toward the product and turns to the companion for input.
The companion looks at the product while the shopper watches their reaction.
The shopper and companion continue quietly comparing the option without purchasing.

kling_prompt_sections.camera: 10-second realistic in-store medium shot from a salesperson-observable angle, three-quarter front or side-front view; customer face, gaze direction, subtle expression, upper body, hands, product display, and price area visible; one primary shopper and one quiet companion, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
kling_prompt_sections.scene: a jewelry counter with bright but natural display lighting; visible product setup: two small jewelry pieces in a glass case with discreet tags.

behavior_timeline.event: The primary shopper stands near the product with one companion nearby.
The shopper gestures toward the product and turns to the companion for input.
The companion looks at the product while the shopper watches their reaction.
The shopper and companion continue quietly comparing the option without purchasing.

kling_prompt_sections.negative: no back-only shot, no face hidden, no hands outside frame, no extra shoppers besides the companion, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.

kling_prompt:
Camera: 10-second realistic in-store medium shot from a salesperson-observable angle, three-quarter front or side-front view; customer face, gaze direction, subtle expression, upper body, hands, product display, and price area visible; one primary shopper and one quiet companion, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
Scene: a jewelry counter with bright but natural display lighting; visible product setup: two small jewelry pieces in a glass case with discreet tags.
Customer behavior style: The shopper stays near the display and examines details with visible curiosity.
Behavior timeline:
- 0-2s: The primary shopper stands near the product with one companion nearby.
- 2-5s: The shopper gestures toward the product and turns to the companion for input.
- 5-8s: The companion looks at the product while the shopper watches their reaction.
- 8-10s: The shopper and companion continue quietly comparing the option without purchasing.
Negative constraints: no back-only shot, no face hidden, no hands outside frame, no extra shoppers besides the companion, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.
